data.title: Nexstar Media Group to Report 2026 First Quarter Financial Results, Host Conference Call and Webcast on May 7
data.description: Nexstar Media Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: NXST) based in Irving, Texas, is set to release its first quarter financial results for 2026 on May 7th. The company will hold a conference call and webcast at 10:00 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing 1-877-407-9208 or 1-201-493-6784 with the conference ID 13759681 for both domestic and international callers. Additionally, a live webcast of the call will be available for participants to tune in.

data.title: CoStar Group Ranked No. 1 on Washington Business Journal’s List of Women on Public Company Boards
data.description: In Arlington, Virginia, CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP), a prominent online real estate marketplace, information, and analytics provider, has secured the top spot on the Washington Business Journal's yearly ranking. They hold the position of No. 1 among public companies for having the highest presence of women on their boards of directors. This achievement underscores CoStar Group's dedication to establishing a board that exceeds the norms of corporate governance rather than just fulfilling them. Their commitment to diversity within leadership is evident, showcasing their strong emphasis on gender equality and representation in the corporate realm.
Lebanon's Nawaf Salam: 'We requested the filing of an urgent complaint to the International Security Council following the Israeli aggressions yesterday.'

data.title: Unicycive Therapeutics to Present at the 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference
data.description: Unicycive Therapeutics, Inc., a biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq as UNCY, focusing on treatments for kidney disease, revealed that Dr. Shalabh Gupta, the CEO, is set to speak at the upcoming 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference on April 15, 2026. The presentation is scheduled for 3:45 p.m. ET.
Lebanon's Nawaf Salam: 'We requested from the army and security forces to strengthen the enforcement of state sovereignty in Beirut and to confine weapons to it.'

data.title: NewPower Accelerates EMEA Expansion with Appointment of Enda Ruddy
data.description: On April 9, 2026, in Nashua, New Hampshire, NewPower Worldwide revealed the selection of Enda Ruddy as the Vice President for EMEA Strategic Accounts. This appointment is a significant move to enhance the company's global customer base. NewPower Worldwide is a prominent player in the electronic components distribution sector, and this hiring decision reflects their commitment to strategic growth in the industry.

data.title: Lodging Dynamics Launches Next-Generation Commercial Strategy with the Appointment of CCO Kristie Byrd
data.description: In Provo, Utah on April 9, 2026, a major national hotel management company, Lodging Dynamics Hospitality Group, made an announcement about promoting Kristie Byrd to the newly established position of Chief Commercial Officer (CCO). This decision signals a significant move for the company in enhancing its commercial strategy and operations.

data.title: MSC Income Fund Announces First Quarter 2026 Private Loan Portfolio Activity
data.description: In Houston on April 9, 2026, MSC Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: MSIF) disclosed updates regarding its private loan portfolio. In the initial quarter of 2026, MSC Income initiated new or expanded commitments within its private loan portfolio. The Fund expressed satisfaction with the recent activity.

data.title: CEI Appoints Sunil Senan as Global Chief Executive Officer To Lead Next Phase of AI‑First Enterprise Transformation
data.description: In Pittsburgh on April 9, 2026, a global technology services company and AI engineering firm, CEI, revealed the selection of Sunil Senan as its Global Chief Executive Officer. The appointment of Senan signifies a crucial advancement in the company's transformation to an AI-first enterprise.

data.title: Encore Medical Device Repair Expands Instrument Repair Services and Robotic Instrument Remanufacturing Programs
data.description: Encore Medical Device Repair unveiled new FDA-cleared remanufactured robotic instruments, aiding hospitals in cost reduction for robotic surgeries. The news was shared from Scottsdale, Arizona on April 9, 2026. This development enables Encore to provide customers with more remanufactured Da Vinci Xi instruments, expanding their offerings in this field.

data.title: CoinShares CEO to Participate in Centri Capital Conference 2026
data.description: On April 7, 2026, CoinShares PLC revealed that Jean-Marie Mognetti, the President, CEO, and Co-Founder, will be present at the Centri Capital Conference 2026 on April 14, 2026, at 11:30 AM ET. CoinShares is a prominent global asset manager focused on digital assets and is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol CSHR. This event is anticipated to showcase insights from Mognetti regarding the digital asset landscape.

data.title: ConnectOne Bancorp, Inc. to Host 2026 First Quarter Results Conference Call on April 23, 2026
data.description: Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey - On April 9, 2026, ConnectOne Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: CNOB) disclosed its intention to unveil first-quarter results for the period concluding on March 31, 2026. The information will be made available before the market commences trading on Thursday, April 23, 2026. Additionally, the management of ConnectOne, the parent company of ConnectOne Bank, has scheduled a conference call and live audio webcast for April 23, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time to analyze the Company's financial outcomes and operational performance.

data.title: GXO names new commercial leader to drive growth and enhance partnerships for long-term success.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record low of 3.8%, with over 200,000 jobs added in the past month alone. This marks the lowest unemployment rate in the last decade. The report also shows a significant increase in job opportunities across various sectors, including healthcare, technology, and manufacturing. Additionally, wage growth has seen a steady rise of 3.2% compared to last year. Experts attribute this positive trend to a strong economy and increased consumer spending. Despite these promising statistics, there are concerns about potential inflation and its impact on the job market in the coming months.

data.title: Foghorn Therapeutics to Present New Preclinical Data for Selective SMARCA2 Inhibitor FHD-909 and Selective CBP, EP300 and ARID1B Degrader Programs at the 2026 AACR Annual Meeting
data.description: Recent preclinical findings regarding FHD-909 (also known as LY4050784) have shown promising results, indicating the possibility of further development opportunities when used in conjunction with an anti-PD-1 antibody for SMARCA4 (BRG1)-mutant lung cancer. The data suggests that this combination therapy could be effective in targeting this specific type of lung cancer, potentially leading to improved treatment outcomes. This discovery opens up new avenues for research and development in the field of oncology.

data.title: Shoals Technologies Group, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
data.description: Shoals Technologies Group, Inc. has revealed that the earnings release for the first quarter of 2026 will be shared with the public. The company also announced plans to hold a conference call pertaining to these earnings. Investors and stakeholders can mark their calendars for this important update from the company. This communication is crucial in understanding the financial performance of Shoals Technologies Group, Inc. during the initial period of the year. Stay tuned for further details on the specific date and time of the earnings release and conference call.

data.title: Phoenix Service Partners Upsizes Credit Facility to Fund Continued Growth
data.description: College Station, Texas-based Phoenix Service Partners revealed an increase in its asset-backed credit facility to bolster its expansion. The company offers high-horsepower, low-emission natural gas compression services, crucial for energy infrastructure in the Permian and Eagle Ford basins. PNC Bank spearheaded the arrangement of the new facility, with a group of lenders granting Phoenix access to a total of $600 million in capital to fuel its growth.

data.title: ScottsMiracle-Gro Completes Divestiture of Hawthorne Subsidiary
data.description: The recent sale to Vireo Growth has strengthened the emphasis on the consumer lawn and garden business in North America. This strategic move aims to enhance operations within this sector, which plays a significant role in the region. The sale involves a substantial amount of investment, marking a key milestone for the company's growth trajectory. By narrowing the focus to this particular market segment, the company is poised to capitalize on opportunities and drive innovation in the consumer lawn and garden industry. This sale to Vireo Growth underscores the commitment to maximizing growth potential and meeting the evolving needs of customers in North America.

data.title: Enterprise Declares Quarterly Distribution; Enterprise to Host Calls on Annual Supply Appraisal Forecast and First Quarter 2026 Earnings
data.description: In Houston, Enterprise Products Partners L.P. declared a cash distribution for Q1 2026 of $0.55 per unit ($2.20 annually) for common unitholders. The payment date is May 14, 2026, with the record date set on April 30, 2026.

data.title: OTC Markets Group Welcomes Cardiff Lexington Corporation to OTCQX
data.description: On April 9, 2026, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Cardiff Lexington Corporation (OTCM: CDIX), a healthcare services holding company concentrating on orthopedic, spine, and pain management, is now eligible for trading on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc. oversees trading for 12,000 U.S. and international securities. Cardiff Lexington Corporation made the transition from the OTCQB® Venture Market to the OTCQX market.

data.title: Rani Therapeutics Appoints Dr. Sara Kenkare-Mitra as Strategic Advisor to Advance Platform and Clinical Strategy
data.description: On April 9, 2026, Rani Therapeutics Holdings, Inc. based in San Jose, California, disclosed the addition of Dr. Sara Kenkare-Mitra as a Strategic Advisor. Rani Therapeutics, listed on Nasdaq as RANI, is a clinical-stage company specializing in oral delivery of biologics and medications. Dr. Kenkare-Mitra boasts nearly 30 years of expertise in biologics and small molecule drug research and advancement. She has successfully secured global regulatory endorsements and managed commercial launches in diverse fields such as oncology, immunology, neurodegeneration, ophthalmology, and respiratory diseases.
